Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3F00 "SOLDIEROFLIGHT-5000-3F00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $5000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Soldier of Light.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $5000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $5020 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $3F96. However the true start address is $3F00.
